title: Amtech - One Piece Axe for Splitting Light Wood and Kindling for Camping, Easy to Use with Ergonomic Grip, Long Lasting and Durable Carbon Steel, Includes Blade Guard for Safe Storage
features: CAMPING MUST-HAVE: The slim profile of this one piece camping axe is ideal for splitting light wood and kindling at home and on camping trips - an essential for both seasoned campers and first-time explorers!
DURABLE: One piece construction made with strong, drop forged carbon steel for long lasting use and extra confidence.
EASY TO USE: Designed with an ergonomic grip that’s comfortable for both men and women to use. The axe also comes with a blade guard so that you can safely store it when you’re not using it!
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The axe is made from strong, deep-forged carbon steel. Ideal for splitting wood and kindling at home or when camping. The ergonomic grip provides comfort and confidence when using, while a blade guard adds safety when the axe is not in use.
